title: Get notified of funding opportunities from Employment and Social Development Canada (ESDC) - Canada.ca
content:
## Get notified of funding opportunities from Employment and Social Development Canada (ESDC)
You are signing up to receive notification emails for funding opportunities from Employment and Social Development Canada  ( ESDC ).
- emails will come from " ESDC Funding Opportunities" esdc.funding.opportunity.edsc.occasion.financement@notification.canada.ca.
- To complete your subscription , please ensure you have clicked on the “confirm your email  address” link included in the confirmation email.
- we only use your email address to send you ESDC funding opportunities
- we do not share your email address
- the emails never ask for personal information
- this service is optional and only people who register will receive the emails

## Privacy notice statement
We collect your email under Section 7 of the Department of Employment and Social Development Act .
We use it to share information about the functions, programs, and activities of the institution, including for grants and contributions.
We protect your information according to the Privacy Act .
The Privacy Act provides individuals with:
- the right to access any personal information under the control of ESDC
- the right to request its correction
- the right to complain to the Privacy Commissioner of Canada about the handling of that personal information
The personal information collected for contract purposes is linked with Personal Information Bank PSU 912 .
You can unsubscribe at any time - there is a link in every email. We will delete your email if this service ends.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
